title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Navneet Education Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Navneet Education Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Navneet Education Ventures Solutions:
Navneet Education Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education Ventures Solutions!
